blended.narrative: Ski Santa Fe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Strong winds with gusts to 44 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: overcast, highs of 47°F, gusts to 44 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 4".
